title: Check if the linkedin-viral-orch skill exists in the file system
job:
Check if the linkedin-viral-orch skill exists in the file system and document the results.

Task:
1. Check if skills/linkedin-viral-orch/ directory exists using ls
2. If it exists, list all files and subdirectories recursively with find
3. Check if skills/active/linkedin-viral-orch symlink exists
4. Write the complete results to a file at output/skill-check-results.md

The output file should contain:
- Whether the skill directory exists
- Full folder structure if found
- Whether the active symlink exists
- List of all files in the skill folder

This will give us a clear answer about whether the skill was successfully created.
